sine_proxy
uvm_ms_proxy
virtual
sine_proxy

Proxy used by sine wave driver and monitor for AMS communication. Must be implemented in the bridge.

Driver
push
virtual task push(
real 
amplitude
)

Send the given amplitude to be driven by the bridge

configure_driver
virtual function void configure_driver (
int 
points_per_period
)

Set any config values that the driver needs

Monitor
amplitude
real amplitude

Changes when a new amplitude is available.

sample
virtual task sample(
output 
real 
amplitude
)

Get the amplitude observed by the bridge, but after waiting for a peak or trough if the clock is enabled. This is intended to allow for changes in frequency as well as amplitude. If the clock is disabled, wait for the wave to stabilize before sampling.

Parameters
amplitude
output real

output amplitude read by the task.
